/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG "CMakeFiles/crow-server.dir/generated/LogicBaseListener.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/crow-server.dir/generated/LogicBaseVisitor.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/crow-server.dir/generated/LogicLexer.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/crow-server.dir/generated/LogicListener.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/crow-server.dir/generated/LogicParser.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/crow-server.dir/generated/LogicVisitor.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/crow-server.dir/src/ASTBuilder.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/crow-server.dir/src/ASTUtils.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/crow-server.dir/src/main.cpp.o" -o crow-server  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib /usr/local/lib/libantlr4-runtime.so -lpthread
